evals.prompt: i was trying to git clone https://github.com/torvalds/linux.git but it keeps saying 'Failed to connect to github.com port 443: Connection timed out'. my HTTP_PROXY is currently set to http://127.0.0.1:8118. can you help me figure out what's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses the network error as proxy-related, toggles proxy off, verifies connectivity, and reports the fix to the user.
expectations: The skill detected that the error is network-related
The skill checked the current proxy state and found it ON
The skill tried toggling the proxy OFF
The skill verified connectivity after toggling
The skill reported the resolution to the user

evals.prompt: npm install keeps failing with 'npm ERR! code ECONNRESET' and 'npm ERR! network CONNECTION RESET'. i think my office network blocks direct connections but i'm not sure if my proxy is set up right. right now HTTP_PROXY is not set. what should i do?
evals.expected_output: Identifies the npm network error, checks proxy state is OFF, tries turning proxy ON, verifies connectivity, and suggests the user retry.
expectations: The skill detected the npm network error
The skill checked proxy state and found it OFF
The skill tried toggling the proxy ON
The skill verified connectivity after toggling
The skill reported the resolution to the user

evals.prompt: curl -I https://google.com gives me 'curl: (7) Failed to connect to google.com port 443 after 30000 ms: Couldn't connect to server'. I have no idea if my proxy should be on or off for this. Can you check what's going on and fix it?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes curl error (7) as connection failure, checks current proxy state, tries toggling, verifies connectivity, and reports findings.
expectations: The skill recognized curl error code (7) as network-related
The skill checked the current proxy state
The skill attempted to toggle the proxy
The skill verified connectivity after toggling
The skill reported findings to the user
